summary: Completed comprehensive testing of iteration 12 features: Admin Dashboard overhaul with all stats, Defaulters page, Admissions modal with fee screenshots, and navigation updates. All 20 backend tests passed. All frontend features verified working correctly.

issues: Mobile nav shows only 4 items visible at once (Dashboard, Courses, Students, Payments) - remaining items (Admissions, Diploma, Defaulters) require horizontal scroll. This is acceptable responsive behavior but could be improved with a hamburger menu.

passed_tests: Backend: Admin login works with correct password (OEC@Admin#2026!Secure)
Backend: Admin login with wrong password returns 401
Backend: GET /api/admin/stats requires authentication (401 without)
Backend: GET /api/admin/stats returns all 14 required fields
Backend: monthly_growth is array of 6 objects with month/students/enrollments
Backend: All numeric fields in stats have correct types
Backend: month_name format is correct (e.g., 'April 2026')
Backend: GET /api/admin/defaulters requires authentication
Backend: GET /api/admin/defaulters returns array
Backend: PUT /api/admin/defaulters/{id}/deactivate requires auth
Backend: PUT /api/admin/defaulters/{id}/activate requires auth
Backend: Deactivate with invalid ID returns 404
Backend: Activate with invalid ID returns 404
Backend: GET /api/admin/admission-forms requires authentication
Backend: GET /api/admin/admission-forms returns array
Backend: Admission forms include installment_1_url and installment_2_url fields
Backend: GET /api/courses returns array (8 courses)
Backend: GET /api/admin/students returns array (4 students)
Backend: GET /api/admin/enrollments returns array (7 enrollments)
Backend: GET /api/diploma-tracks returns array
Frontend: Admin Dashboard loads with all stat cards (Courses, Students, Diploma Students, Enrollments, Pending, Defaulters)
Frontend: Admin Dashboard shows revenue stats (Admission+1st Installment, 2nd Installment, Monthly Revenue with month name)
Frontend: Admin Dashboard shows New Students with month name
Frontend: Admin Dashboard shows Approved Students and Pending Approval counts
Frontend: Admin Dashboard has growth chart with monthly bars
Frontend: Admin Dashboard has 4 Quick Actions (Manage Courses, Manage Diploma Tracks, Manage Students, Manage Payments)
Frontend: Admin Dashboard has 7 nav items (Dashboard, Courses, Students, Payments, Admissions, Diploma, Defaulters)
Frontend: Admin Defaulters page loads at /admin/defaulters
Frontend: Admin Defaulters page has search input
Frontend: Admin Defaulters page shows info box about overdue 2nd installment
Frontend: Admin Defaulters page shows 'No defaulters found' when no defaulters exist
Frontend: Admin Defaulters page has 7 nav items
Frontend: Admin Admissions page loads with 3 admission forms
Frontend: Admin Admissions modal shows FEE SCREENSHOTS section
Frontend: Admin Admissions modal shows Admission Fee section
Frontend: Admin Admissions modal shows 1st Installment section
Frontend: Admin Admissions modal shows 2nd Installment section
Frontend: Admin Admissions page has 7 nav items
Frontend: Mobile Admin Dashboard shows all 6 stat cards
Frontend: Mobile Admin Dashboard shows all 3 revenue cards
Frontend: Mobile Admin Dashboard shows growth chart
Frontend: Mobile Admin Dashboard shows all 4 quick actions
Frontend: Student Dashboard redirects unauthenticated users to login (OAuth required)
seed_data_creation: None - used existing data (8 courses, 4 students, 7 enrollments, 1 diploma enrollment, 3 admission forms)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 12 tested comprehensive admin dashboard overhaul. Stats endpoint returns 14 fields including total_diploma_students, admission_plus_inst1, inst2_total, monthly_revenue, month_name, students_this_month, total_pending_approval, defaulters_count, and monthly_growth array (6 months). Defaulters page at /admin/defaulters shows students with overdue 2nd installment with deactivate/re-activate buttons. Admissions modal shows 3 fee screenshot sections (Admission Fee, 1st Installment, 2nd Installment). All admin pages have 7 nav items. Student Dashboard has status badge (Active Student/Pending Approval/Not Enrolled) and overall progress percentage bar - requires Google OAuth so can't be fully tested via Playwright. No defaulters currently in system (all students up to date with payments).

mocked_apis_list: Resend email notifications (logs to console instead of sending real emails)

student_dashboard.status_badge: data-testid='student-status' - shows Active Student/Pending Approval/Not Enrolled
student_dashboard.progress_bar: data-testid='overall-progress' - shows overall learning progress percentage
